title: pseudogynoxys berlandieri
intro: Pseudogynoxys berlandieri, also known as Mexican firecracker or Berlandier's firecracker, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems, as well as skin conditions and wounds. Pseudogynoxys berlandieri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and its leaves and flowers are used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
